itinerary.title: Pickup & Travel to Guptkashi
itinerary.description: Pickup from Delhi, Dehradun, or Kotdwar and drive to Guptkashi. Enjoy scenic Himalayan views along the way. Check in at hotel for overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Kedarnath Darshan
itinerary.description: Early morning trek or helicopter ride to Kedarnath Temple. Attend darshan and explore the sacred surroundings. Overnight stay in Kedarnath or return to Guptkashi depending on travel plan.

itinerary.title: Return from Kedarnath
itinerary.description: Complete morning darshan if required and return to Guptkashi. Relax and enjoy the peaceful mountain atmosphere. Overnight stay at Guptkashi.

itinerary.title: Travel to Badrinath
itinerary.description: Drive from Guptkashi to Badrinath through beautiful Himalayan routes. Check in at hotel and attend evening aarti at Badrinath Temple.

itinerary.title: Badrinath Dham & Mana Village
itinerary.description: Morning darshan at Badrinath Temple followed by a visit to Mana Village, Vyas Gufa, Ganesh Gufa, and Bhim Pul. Return to hotel for overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Return Journey
itinerary.description: Begin your return journey towards Dehradun, Kotdwar, or Delhi with unforgettable memories of the sacred Do Dham Yatra.
